Home / Services / Hardwood Floor Refinishing

Hardwood Floor Refinishing

Bring your worn hardwood floors back to life with our expert refinishing services.

Hardwood floors add timeless elegance to any home, but they can become worn and scratched over time. USA Floor Contractor offers professional hardwood floor refinishing services to restore the natural beauty of your floors. We use dustless sanding equipment and high-quality finishes to minimize disruption and create a durable, long-lasting result.

Our refinishing process involves sanding away the old finish, repairing any imperfections, and applying multiple coats of a protective finish. We offer a variety of finish options, including polyurethane, oil-based, and water-based finishes, to suit your specific needs and preferences. Given Long Beach's sunny climate, we recommend finishes with UV protection to prevent fading and discoloration.

Whether you have traditional hardwood floors or engineered hardwood, we have the expertise to refinish them to perfection. We take pride in our attention to detail and our commitment to customer satisfaction. Revitalize your hardwood floors and enhance the beauty of your home with USA Floor Contractor's refinishing services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough sanding of the existing floor to remove old finish and imperfections.
  2. 02 Step 2: Repair of any scratches, dents, or other damage.
  3. 03 Step 3: Application of stain (optional) to achieve the desired color.
  4. 04 Step 4: Application of multiple coats of protective finish for durability and shine.

Benefits

  • Restored beauty and shine
  • Increased durability
  • Enhanced home value
  • Elimination of scratches and imperfections

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does hardwood floor refinishing take?

The duration of hardwood floor refinishing depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project. Most projects can be completed in 3-5 days.

Is dustless sanding really dustless?

While no sanding process is completely dust-free, our dustless sanding equipment significantly reduces the amount of dust produced, minimizing disruption and cleanup.

Can I walk on the floors immediately after refinishing?

No, you will need to wait for the finish to fully cure before walking on the floors. We will provide specific instructions on drying times and proper care.

Get a Free Estimate
